library.title: Library
library.emptyDescription: Upload an audio file to create your first lesson.

upload.title: Upload a lesson
upload.description: Upload an audio file to generate a transcript automatically. It's compressed automatically — no need to shrink it yourself first.
upload.fileTooLarge: This file is too large to process (over 1GB).
upload.fileTooLargeAfterCompression: This audio is too long to fit even after automatic compression. Try splitting it into shorter parts.
upload.compressionFailed: Couldn't compress this audio file. It may be corrupted or in an unsupported format.

study.processing: This lesson is still being processed. Keep this tab open — check back in a few minutes for long audio.
